title: doronicum hirsutum
intro: Doronicum hirsutum, also known as hairy leopard's bane, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Doronicum hirsutum include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support digestive health. Doronicum hirsutum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and creams for topical application.
